Not every educator obsesses over music; popular hits rock class too!
Earworms turn real—I organize everything!
Felt similar until family gatherings turned into impromptu life coach sessions peppered with side-eye glances at my hand!
Harmony lasts longer than a high note.
Like crafting a timeless melody rather than chasing chart-toppers.
Taught resilience through community activities!
Being surrounded by institutions growing up definitely helped me develop patience!
